series.curator_notes: Series has extensive spinoffs: Bibi und Tina (separate series), Bibi erzählt (short stories), Hörbücher (audiobooks - separate from Hörspiele), multiple musicals, Kinofilm radio plays, ASMR content, English learning series, and various single songs. Main episodes follow 'Folge N: Title' format. Special multi-part serial 'Kampf um Kartoffelbrei' released as Teil 1-11 are included as they form a serialized story. Box sets like the full 'Kampf um Kartoffelbrei' compilation and 'Weihnachtsfolgen' are excluded. Some episodes have extended versions with bonus content - the standard editions are preferred. Episode 100 (anniversary) and 132 (musical edition) have extended versions excluded.

review.notes:
Gap analysis:
- Folge 62: Confirmed not available on Spotify after multiple searches. This is a genuine gap.
- Folges 100, 132, 148, 149, 150: Found and adding the extended versions which include bonus content. These are the primary releases for these episodes.

Excluded duplicates verification:
- The excluded albums for episodes 100, 132, 148, 149, 150 were incorrectly marked as duplicates. These are actually the main releases with bonus tracks, not duplicates of other editions. They have been added back.

Kinofilm albums:
- Three Kinofilm Hörspiele albums identified and proposed for split. These are adaptations of the movies "Das große Hexentreffen" (2002 and 2025 releases) and "und das Geheimnis der blauen Eulen" (2004).

Remaining excluded albums appear correct:
- Soundtracks, single songs, audiobooks, ASMR, educational content, spin-off short stories, advent calendars, musicals, and compilation box sets are appropriately excluded.

splits.reason: Kinofilm Hörspiele are standalone movie adaptations, not part of the regular episode numbering. Parents would expect these as separate entries from the main series.
Special 11-part story arc "Kampf um Kartoffelbrei" that is distinct from regular numbered episodes. Works as a standalone mini-series.
